title: NEXO
description: A Fabric mod that unleashes the power of nuclear technology.
body:
‍NEXO(Nuclear Engineering and X-factor Optimization) is an ambitious mod designed for the Fabric modloader, introducing complex nuclear technologies into the Minecraft world. Built for players who love automation and engineering, NEXO allows you to create highly efficient nuclear reactors, manage energy/fluid systems, and explore advanced machinery for resource processing.

Features:
Nuclear Reactors: Design and build powerful reactors with custom components and manage their energy output.
Energy Management: Optimize energy distribution across your base with cutting-edge technology.

For an optimal experience, use Roughly Enough Items (REI) along with Architectury API and Cloth Config API to help manage recipes and configurations. If you need any extra information go to our [wiki](https://nexo-wiki.readthedocs.io/) or [discord](https://discord.gg/kCn8HwNcbS).

Since this mod is in its early stages you should stay tuned for many more updates as the mod continues to develop! Feedback, suggestions and issues are always welcome on the [GitHub page](https://github.com/mopsy14/NEXO) and [discord](https://discord.gg/kCn8HwNcbS).
